title: Leading a Remote International Team
description: Six time zones, four nationalities, one coherent team — the async-first leadership playbook.
summary_pt_br: Liderança remota: escreva decisões, respeite fusos, dê contexto, confie, revise semanalmente.

scenes.subtitle_en: Six time zones, four nationalities, one coherent team — the async-first leadership playbook.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Liderança remota: escreva decisões, respeite fusos, dê contexto, confie, revise semanalmente.

scenes.text_en: Six time zones, four nationalities, one coherent team — the async-first leadership playbook. Focus: leading a remote international team. Every decision goes in writing, or it did not happen.
scenes.text_pt: Liderança remota: escreva decisões, respeite fusos, dê contexto, confie, revise semanalmente. Foco: leading a remote international team. Toda decisão vai por escrito, ou não aconteceu.

scenes.title: Leading a Remote International Team
scenes.body_en: Async-first remote leadership: WRITE decisions (not just discuss). RESPECT time zones (no surprise syncs). STATE context fully (links, history). TRUST by default. REVIEW outcomes weekly.
scenes.body_pt: Liderança remota: escreva decisões, respeite fusos, dê contexto, confie, revise semanalmente.

examples.en: Every decision goes in writing, or it did not happen.
examples.pt: Toda decisão vai por escrito, ou não aconteceu.

examples.en: No surprise syncs across four time zones — write it down instead.
examples.pt: Sem syncs surpresa em 4 fusos — escreve.

examples.en: Weekly review in writing, thirty minutes, Fridays.
examples.pt: Revisão semanal por escrito, 30 minutos, sexta.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Leading a Remote International Team

exercise.question: Complete: "Every ___ goes in writing, or it did not happen."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Every decision goes in writing, or it did not happen."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Toda decisão vai por escrito, ou não aconteceu.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
No surprise syncs across four time zones — write it down instead.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "No surprise syncs across four time zones — write it down instead."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Sem syncs surpresa em 4 fusos — escreve.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Leading a Remote International Team — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre leading a remote international team. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara — design your remote team's first week.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you handle time zones?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Weekly written review, thirty minutes, Fridays.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Fully, by default. Review outcomes, not hours.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Only when a decision affects three or more.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Async-first leadership is writing that respects time.

scenes.title: The distributed team
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four async-first leadership principles. Use at least three remote terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On her first Monday as head of a remote team spanning São Paulo, Nairobi, Berlin, and Seoul, Zara wrote her first memo.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Every decision goes in writing, or it did not happen — that is rule one for this team from today forward.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: And we respect time zones — no surprise syncs across four time zones when a written decision will suffice instead.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Context goes in full — every link, every history, every relevant thread attached before the decision is even requested.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: Weekly review is thirty minutes on Fridays, in writing — we measure outcomes, not hours on a video call.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Remote leadership, Zara believed, is writing that respects time — and trust that makes the writing actually worth reading.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Leading a Remote International Team". Six time zones, four nationalities, one coherent team — the async-first leadership playbook. Every decision goes in writing, or it did not happen. No surprise syncs across four time zones — write it down instead. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Leading a Remote International Team". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Leading a Remote International Team".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Leading a Remote International Team".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
